identificationModule.briefTitle: Acute Oral Ketones or Carbohydrate Supplement Modify Heart Function in Heart Failure?
identificationModule.officialTitle: Does Oral Intake of Beta-hydroxybutyrate Decrease Left Ventricular End-systolic Volume at Cardiac Magnetic Resonance in Patients With Heart Failure Compared to Carbohydrate Placebo?

descriptionModule.briefSummary: Does oral intake of exogenous ketone salt improve heart function measured by cardiac MRI in heart failure compared to oral intake of a carbohydrate placebo?
descriptionModule.detailedDescription:
This study will help to quantify heart and kidney ketone uptake with or without an exogenous ketone salt in heart failure condition.

Participants will have 2 different cardiac MRI to perform:

1. Fasting with exogenous ketone salt supplement
2. Fasting with exogenous carbohydrate supplement

designInfo.interventionModelDescription: Crossover Assignment, Each participant will have to do the 2 Acute supplementation interventions

maskingInfo.maskingDescription: Triple (Participant, Investigator, Outcomes Assessor) Investigators, participants and outcome assessors will be fully blinded.

armGroups.label: Ketone
interventionNames: Dietary Supplement: exogenous ketone salt supplement

interventions.name: exogenous ketone salt supplement
interventions.description: Dietary Supplement: Fasting water and with exogenous ketone salt supplement. Participants will have to take 1 doses of supplement 30 minutes before the scan.
otherNames: Post-Prandial with exogenous ketone salt supplement

interventions.name: exogenous carbohydrate supplement
interventions.description: Dietary Supplement: Fasting water and with exogenous carbohydrate supplement. Participants will have to take 1 doses of supplement 30 minutes before the scan.

primaryOutcomes.measure: Left ventricle ejection fraction by cardiac MRI under acute intake of exogenous ketone salt compared with exogenous carbohydrate placebo in heart failure patients.
primaryOutcomes.description: Measure by Cardiac MR in pourcentage between diastolic and systolic volume in millimeter

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Right ventricle ejection fraction by cardiac MRI after intake supplement in heart failure patients.
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measure by Cardiac MR in pourcentage between diastolic and systolic volume in millimeter

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Ventricle volume by cardiac MRI after intake supplement in heart failure patients.
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measure by Cardiac MR in millimeter

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Cardiac output by cardiac MRI after intake supplement in heart failure patients.
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measure by Cardiac MR in liter per minute

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
secondaryOutcomes.description: Concentration of N-terminal pro-B-type natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP) (pg/ml)

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
Effects of supplement on serum biomarkers
Effects of supplement on the blood pressure of heart failure patients
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measure the blood pressure in systole and diastole in mm Hg

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Effects of supplement on the heart rate of heart failure patients
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measure the heart rate in beat per minute
